productDisplayName: Reebok Men Navy Blue Turbo DMX Shear Sports Shoes
description: Synthetic overlays on a mesh upper, has print at the midfoot region Heavily padded inner and tongue, has a pull tab at the heel collar Has a thick foamy midsole, upraised at the heel, has DMX foam cushioning technology Has a TPU outsole with grooves at the periphery, arched midfoot and is decoupled at the heel
